mapper.select: select * from status_codes where deleted = false order by code_type asc, code_value asc
select * from status_codes where id = #{id} and deleted = false
select * from status_codes where code_type = #{codeType} and code_value = #{codeValue} and deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into status_codes(code_type, code_value, display_name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{codeType}, #{codeValue}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{enabled}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update status_codes set display_name = #{displayName}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
